ham.subject: Your Order #12345678 - Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #12345678 has been successfully placed and is now confirmed.

Order Summary:
- Item: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
- Quantity: 1
- Price: $199.99
- Shipping Address: 123 Maple Street, Springfield, IL 62704

Shipping Details:
The package will be shipped via Amazon Logistics and is expected to arrive on 25-Apr-2026. You can track your shipment at <URL>.

Payment Method:
Your credit card ending in 4242 has been charged $199.99. If you have any issues, please contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. We hope you enjoy your new headphones!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Congratulations! You have been selected for a University Scholarship
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the prestigious Global Scholars Program at XYZ University. Your academic achievements have impressed our selection committee, and we are excited to offer you a scholarship worth $10,000.

To secure your scholarship, please complete the following steps within the next 72 hours:
1. Verify your personal details by clicking the secure link below.
2. Submit the required documents (transcripts, recommendation letters, and a brief statement of purpose).
3. Pay the administrative processing fee of $50 through our official portal.

Failure to complete these steps will result in the forfeiture of your scholarship offer.

Click here to proceed: <URL>

We look forward to welcoming you to XYZ University.

Best regards,
Office of Admissions, XYZ University
